Description: First name(s) (surname). If not entered manually, the system will extract this value from the Full Name field or from MCommunity.
Last name(s) (family or given name). If not entered manually, the system will extract this value from the Full Name field or from MCommunity.
Professional credentials (e.g. M.D., Ph.D.), separated by commas.
The person's current job title. For internal contacts, this is set automatically from MCommunity whenever possible.
Primary department. For internal contacts, this value is updated automatically from MCommunity.
For members and prospective members, the condensed job title to use for reporting purposes.
Appointing or primary department, used for center-wide reporting.
Primary U-M School affiliation, or P2P school, if applicable.
Company or organization. For P2P, this is typically the school district.
Business or main office phone number.
Mobile phone number.
Home phone number.
Office fax number.
Email address, which defaults to the user's U-M level 1 email (@umich.edu) unless overridden by the Preferred Email field.
Preferred email address. Only needed for External Contacts or to manually override an @umich.edu address.
Additional email.
Additional email.
Full mailing address.
City, district or municipality.
State, province, or district.
Country or region.
Link to this person's professional website or lab website. For members, this value is typically displayed in member profile pages.
External profile page. For members, use the profile page from the appointing department.
Bluesky profile handle or URL.
A link to this person's GitHub or GitLab  profile. You can enter the full URL (e.g. https://github.com/gabrielmongefranco) or just the @ name (e.g. @GabrielMongefranco).
LinkedIn profile.
A link to this person's X (Twitter)  profile. You can enter the full URL (e.g. https://twitter.com/catygo_sleep) or just the @ name (e.g. @cathygo_sleep).
Facebook profile.
Michigan Experts Profile ID or URL.

Description: Short biography, for use in websites, conferences, newsletters and other communications.
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
Is this person a member of this Center or Institute?
The date when this person became a member. This field is set manually or when a person is added to the membership group.
List of groups in which this user is a member. Groups can be configured in the Groups List.
The person, core, team, vendor or website that referred this person to the center. Typically this would be the first core or team that provided a service to this person.
Indicates whether this person is a PI.
Indicates whether this staff member is a study team member. For PIs, say No.
The primary principal investigator that this study team member works under. For PIs, leave this field blank.
The primary lab which this study team member reports. Please format as: "LabName (PI FullName)".
Indicates whether this person has ever received services (e.g. consultations, awards, program participation). This value can be set manually, or if empty, it is set automatically based on history.
The date when this person last received a service (e.g. consultation, award, program participation). It can be set manually, or if left blank, it is auto-calculated based on history.

Indicates whether this person has ever attended events hosted by this center. This value can be set manually, or if empty, it is set when an Event Summary is added that includes this person as a registrant, attendee or speaker.

The date when this person last attended an event hosted by this center. It can be set manually, or if left blank, it is auto-calculated based on Event Summary entries that include this person as a registrant, attendee or speaker.
For team members, this is their primary team. For all other contacts, this is the team that maintains the relationship with this person, if applicable.
The research area focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
The research methodology and applications focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
The population focus for this investigator, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
Indicates whether this person can be or has been considered for a speaking engagement or presentation at a University of Michigan event.

Indicates whether this person can be or has been considered for a speaking engagement or presentation outside of University of Michigan. For external contacts, it indicates whether they can be or have been speakers at U-M events.
Indicates whether this person has ever earned media coverage for their professional work.
The type of record in MCommunity, if any.
If checked, this person has opted out of receiving communications. The specific channels to which they unsubscribed can be found in the Do Not Contact List.
The display name for this person, formatted for use in drop-down menus in other lists.
Contact name, pre-formatted with profile pictures and a custom menu.
